meta.title: The Drafting Table Demo
meta.description: A lightweight WordPress Playground demo for The Drafting Table theme and companion plugin.
meta.author: dknauss

options.blogdescription: Notes on Form, Nature, and the Drawn Line

steps.code: <?php require_once '/wordpress/wp-load.php'; require_once ABSPATH . 'wp-admin/includes/plugin.php'; $starter_post = get_page_by_path( 'hello-world', OBJECT, 'post' ); if ( $starter_post ) { wp_delete_post( $starter_post->ID, true ); } $starter_page = get_page_by_path( 'sample-page' ); if ( $starter_page ) { wp_delete_post( $starter_page->ID, true ); } if ( ! function_exists( 'the_drafting_table_install_demo_content' ) ) { throw new Exception( 'The Drafting Table demo installer is unavailable.' ); } $install_result = the_drafting_table_install_demo_content(); if ( is_wp_error( $install_result ) ) { $issues = $install_result->get_error_data( 'the_drafting_table_demo_install_failed' ); $issues = is_array( $issues ) ? array_map( 'wp_strip_all_tags', $issues ) : array( wp_strip_all_tags( $install_result->get_error_message() ) ); $blocking_issues = array(); foreach ( $issues as $issue ) { if ( false === strpos( $issue, 'Could not import the bundled site logo.' ) && false === strpos( $issue, 'One or more bundled images failed to import into the Media Library.' ) ) { $blocking_issues[] = $issue; } } if ( ! empty( $blocking_issues ) ) { throw new Exception( implode( '; ', $blocking_issues ) ); } } $journal = get_page_by_path( 'journal' ); if ( $journal ) { $sub_page = get_page_by_path( 'journal/sub' ); if ( ! $sub_page ) { $sub_page_id = wp_insert_post( array( 'post_title' => 'Sub', 'post_name' => 'sub', 'post_status' => 'publish', 'post_type' => 'page', 'post_parent' => (int) $journal->ID, 'meta_input' => array( '_the_drafting_table_demo_content' => '1' ) ), true ); if ( is_wp_error( $sub_page_id ) ) { throw new Exception( wp_strip_all_tags( $sub_page_id->get_error_message() ) ); } $sub_page = get_post( $sub_page_id ); } if ( $sub_page instanceof WP_Post ) { $sub_two = get_page_by_path( 'journal/sub/sub-two' ); if ( ! $sub_two ) { $sub_two_id = wp_insert_post( array( 'post_title' => 'Sub Two', 'post_name' => 'sub-two', 'post_status' => 'publish', 'post_type' => 'page', 'post_parent' => (int) $sub_page->ID, 'meta_input' => array( '_the_drafting_table_demo_content' => '1' ) ), true ); if ( is_wp_error( $sub_two_id ) ) { throw new Exception( wp_strip_all_tags( $sub_two_id->get_error_message() ) ); } } } } flush_rewrite_rules();
